# True AI — XMOBILE WARDROBE INTELLIGENCE

## Product
True AI (XMOBILE) is a Turkish AI-powered wardrobe assistant mobile app for iOS and Android.

## What it does
- Analyzes the user's wardrobe (photos of clothes)
- Generates daily outfit suggestions based on weather, calendar events, and personal style
- Virtual try-on: AI renders the user wearing selected clothes (30-60 seconds)
- 3D avatar with clothing overlay
- Outfit history tracking with favorites

## Target audience
Turkish-speaking users, age 25-45, urban, fashion-conscious, tech-savvy.
Also available in English.

## Business model
Freemium mobile app:
- Free: unlimited wardrobe + 5 AI outfit suggestions/month + last 10 outfit history
- Pro: ₺149/month or ₺999/year (unlimited suggestions, virtual try-on, 3D avatar, Instagram Story export)
- Lifetime: ₺2,499 one-time payment

## Status
Pre-launch. Building waitlist at this website. Expected App Store launch: 2026.

## Tech stack
React Native (Expo), Claude API for outfit generation, Fashn.ai for virtual try-on, OpenWeatherMap for weather data.

## Key differentiators
1. AI outfit suggestion based on real-time weather + calendar context
2. Virtual try-on (AI renders outfit on user's photo in 30-60s)
3. On-device processing — photos don't leave the device
4. Turkish market focus with full Turkish language support

## Links
- Waitlist: https://trueai-xmobile.vercel.app
- Contact: dogrucanemek@gmail.com
- Pricing: https://trueai-xmobile.vercel.app/pricing.md
